Meaning.Vi: Cái ví (dùng để đựng tiền mặt, thẻ, giấy tờ nhỏ)
Meaning.En: A small flat case used for carrying money, cards, and small personal items, typically kept in a pocket.
Meaning.Example: He pulled a few bills from his wallet to pay for the coffee.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống: Mở ví để thanh toán tiền khi mua sắm hoặc đi du lịch.
Situation.En: Scenario: Opening a wallet to pay for purchases or during travel.

Situation.Vi: Tình huống: Nhớ quên ví khi ra khỏi nhà, dẫn đến không thể thanh toán.
Situation.En: Scenario: Realizing you forgot your wallet after leaving home, making payment impossible.
